question: What is the policy regarding lateral entry students and how many credits can they transfer?
answer:
Lateral entry is available at MSAJCE via TN-LEA counselling for Diploma/B.Sc. Math holders.

To be eligible for lateral entry:

• You need a Diploma in an appropriate Engineering/Technology field from the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Tamil Nadu, or an equivalent qualification.
• Alternatively, a recognized Bachelor's Degree in Science with a minimum of 3 years duration (10+2+3 pattern) and core Mathematics as one of the subjects is also accepted. Note that degrees other than Bachelor of Science are not eligible.

Regarding minimum eligibility marks for lateral entry:

• General Category: 55.00%
• Backward Class (including Backward Class Muslim): 50.00%
• MBC & DNC: 45.00%
• SC / SCA / ST: Mere pass in the qualifying examination for Diploma / B.Sc. Degree / Equivalent

The B.E./B.Tech. program for lateral entry students is 3 years long, consisting of 6 semesters.

I don't have information about the exact number of credits transferable.

Interested in knowing about the various B.E./B.Tech programs available at our college?

evaluation.reason: The bot's response accurately reflects the information provided in the source text regarding lateral entry eligibility, duration of the program, and the fact that it doesn't have the exact number of transferable credits.
